channel.title: Sam Molyneux - Blog
channel.description: All posts - bikepacking and technical writing

item.title: Cadiz to Ronda
item.description: Through Parque Natural Los Alcornocales to Ronda

item.title: Cadiz part two
item.description: Lots of sunsets

item.title: Cadiz part one
item.description: First few days in Cadiz

item.title: How I'm coding in March 2026
item.description: A snapshot of my development setup

item.title: human.json
item.description: Adding a human.json file to the site

item.title: Tarifa to Cadiz
item.description: Euro Velo 8 along the Costa de la Luz

item.title: Tangier and Morocco reflections
item.description: Including a map

item.title: Tetouan to Tangier
item.description: Last day of riding in Morocco

item.title: Tetouan
item.description: Chefchaouen's underrated white washed counterpart

item.title: Chefchaouen to Tetouan
item.description: Rain in the high mountains out of Chefchaouen followed by clear skies on the coast, with some mechanicals to keep things exciting.

item.title: Chefchaouen
item.description: Incredible but conspicuously on the tourist route

item.title: Fes to Chefchaouen
item.description: Rain and mechanical issues balanced with stunning views into Chefchaouen

item.title: Fes
item.description: A day wandering the medina

item.title: El Jadida to Fes
item.description: Through farmland to Fes under dense, low cloud

item.title: El Jadida
item.description: El Jadida 'Portugese city' and market

item.title: Essaouira to El Jadida
item.description: Along the coast to El Jadida via Safi

item.title: Essaouira part three
item.description: More of Essaouira

item.title: Essaouira part two
item.description: Just cats

item.title: Essaouira part one
item.description: The first couple of weeks in Essaouira

item.title: Tamraght to Essaouira
item.description: Through some more mountains and up the coast to Essaouira via Imsouane

item.title: Tamraght and Taghazout
item.description: A stay at the aptly named 'Chill Surfer hostel'

item.title: Tafraout to Tamraght
item.description: Three days of great cycling (mostly) back towards the coast.

item.title: Tafraout
item.description: A rest day exploring Tafraout

item.title: Sidi Ifni to Tafraout
item.description: Climbing inland from Sidi Ifni to Tafraout

item.title: Sidi Ifni
item.description: A full rest day in the southern surf town

item.title: Agadir to Sidi Ifni
item.description: Cycling along the coast from Agadir to Sidi Ifni

item.title: Agadir
item.description: My first stop in Morocco and thus my first blog post
